debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G C : Graph α β
M M' : Set β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
hM' : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M'
hC : C.IsCycleGraph
hCG : C ≤ @Graph.IsMatching.restrict₂ α β G M M' hM hM'
⊢ Disjoint (C.edgeSet ∩ M) (C.edgeSet ∩ M')

proof:
rw [Set.disjoint_left]
  intro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨_, heM'⟩
  have heSub := edgeSet_mono hCG heC
  unfold restrict₂ at heSub
  simp at heSub
  rcases heSub.2.1 with ⟨_, h⟩ | ⟨_, h⟩ <;> [exact h heM'; exact h heM]
successful_attempts:
rw [Set.disjoint_left]
  intro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨_, heM'⟩
  have heSub := edgeSet_mono hCG heC
  unfold restrict₂ at heSub
  simp at heSub
  rcases heSub.2.1 with ⟨_, h⟩ | ⟨_, h⟩ <;> [exact h heM'; exact h heM]
